title: Pure Simulation Core, Effect Adapters, Events, and Dependency Direction · Language Clinic: Domain Events
summary: Entities read global input, clock, screen, sound, and random state; constructors load files; collisions mutate UI; tests require a window; and modules import each other cyclically. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the domain events increment in testable game core and adapter architecture. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theor…
objectives: Emit immutable collision, score, life, wave, cue, and transition records and consume them in explicit order.
Keep display, events, devices, audio, assets, persistence, clock, logging, and packaging behind thin owned adapters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Predict Domain Events · Theory Domain Events
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Asteroids team handles case 4810 during a keyboard-only community arcade night. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-architecture-pure-core-3
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-architecture-pure-core-3.
# Case 5798: a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial.
# Operating constraint: retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity.
# Changed case: cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity.
def worked_asteroids_architecture_pure_core_3(pure_systems: int = 8, effect_adapters: int = 4, hidden_globals: int = 0, dependency_cycles: int = 0, immutable_events: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "playerworked3",
        "seed5798",
        "input3dekrow",
        "frameworked35798",
        "state5798worked3",
        "playtest3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if pure_systems < 4 or effect_adapters < 1:
        return False, pure_systems, "architecture-shape"
    if hidden_globals > 0:
        return False, hidden_globals, "hidden-state"
    if dependency_cycles > 0:
        return False, dependency_cycles, "dependency-cycle"
    if not immutable_events:
        return False, pure_systems, "mutable-events"
    assert pure_systems > effect_adapters
    return True, pure_systems, "testable-game-core"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Build Domain Events evidence · Theory Domain Events
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-domain-events-1dnl2e" that uses case 6415 to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Build Domain Events evidence · Theory Domain Events.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Domain Events into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Build Domain Events evidence · Theory Domain Events, keep Domain Events connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-domain-events-1dnl2e
# Competency: asteroids-domain-events.
# Case 6415: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely.
def evidence_asteroids_domain_events_1dnl2e(pure_systems: int = 8, effect_adapters: int = 4, hidden_globals: int = 0, dependency_cycles: int = 0, immutable_events: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1dnl2e = "1dnl2e-e2lnd1-6415"
    assert evidence_variant_1dnl2e
    evidence_axes_1dnl2e = (
        "player1dnl2e",
        "seed6415",
        "inpute2lnd1",
        "frame1dnl2e6415",
        "state64151dnl2e",
        "playteste2lnd16415",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1dnl2e)) == 6
    if pure_systems < 4 or effect_adapters < 1:
        return False, pure_systems, "architecture-shape"
    if hidden_globals > 0:
        return False, hidden_globals, "hidden-state"
    if dependency_cycles > 0:
        return False, dependency_cycles, "dependency-cycle"
    if not immutable_events:
        return False, pure_systems, "mutable-events"
    assert pure_systems > effect_adapters
    return True, pure_systems, "testable-game-core"
